title: Sith civil war
content:

{{Quote|Every Sith wanted to be king. And so we argued, while the Republic grew frail—its citizens sickened with plague—and became isolated by a decaying infrastructure. Coruscant's throat lay bare beneath our blades, but the Sith plunged their knives into one another's backs instead!|Darth Bane's writings|<ref name="BOS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>}}
At some point during the final [[Standard century/Legends|century]] of the [[New Sith Wars]], a '''civil war''' erupted among the ranks of the [[New Sith]], a resurgent [[Sith Empire (disambiguation)|Sith Empire]] of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith Order]] that originally emerged in [[2000 BBY/Legends|2000 BBY]]. By [[1100 BBY/Legends|1100 BBY]], the Sith had achieved a long-lasting streak of domination in their crusades against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], beginning an era known as the [[Republic Dark Age]].<ref name="TEA" /> Despite their impending conquest, the power-hungry [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lords of the Sith]] were unwilling to unite under a single leader, becoming mired in a string of disagreement and treachery that ultimately left their [[Empire (disambiguation)|empire]] fragmented.<ref name="BOS" />

In the wake of their internal strife,<ref name="BOS" /> a number of independent Sith [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] continued their [[Blood/Legends|bloody]] campaigns throughout entire [[Star system/Legends|star systems]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> collectively maintaining a dominant presence in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. The relentless Sith aggression did not persist unopposed, however, and eventually provoked direct intervention by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] known as [[Skere Kaan]]. In [[1010 BBY]], Kaan denounced the Republic and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] for their inability to halt the decline of [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] civilization. Abandoning the Jedi Order, Kaan rallied a group of likeminded peers called the "Brotherhood", setting out to vanquish the Sith remnants on his own terms.<ref name="WAR" />

Under the pretense of reforming the Republic, Kaan and his Brotherhood waged a [[Standard month/Legends|months]]-long campaign against the scattered Sith enclaves. Within a [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the most powerful of the Sith warlords were either destroyed or intimidated into surrender, earning Kaan commendation from the Jedi Order. Unknown to the Jedi and the Republic, the Jedi Master had been plotting against his former allies the whole time,<ref name="WAR" /> assuming the mantle of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] and uniting the surviving Sith factions to his doctrine of "[[Rule by the Strong]]."<ref name="END">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/88/indexp2.html|text=''Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties''|int=Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties}}</ref> Setting his plans into motion, Kaan organized his twenty thousand followers into a new Sith faction called the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]], initiating the final phase of the New Sith Wars.<ref name="NEC" />
